AIStudio.title: AI Studio
AIStudio.subtitle: Produce consistent and high-quality character images.
AIStudio.copilotAsistanDesc: Enrich and manage your content with Copilot.
AIStudio.activateDesc: Activate your Copilot to enable autonomous drafting, daily intelligence, and exclusive content strategy.
AIStudio.goContainerDesc: Last drop ready, go to container and make it ready for publish.
AIStudio.protocolDesc: Once activated, Copilot mode remains strictly ON for 30 consecutive days. Daily drafting fees (1 ULC) will be auto-deducted from your available balance. If balance is insufficient, drafts will pause but subscription remains valid until expiry.
AIStudio.icerikYukleDesc: Include your own custom content into the system and prepare for publishing.
AIStudio.aiMuseDesc: Create your own character and tell consistent stories.
AIStudio.animateDesc: Bring your images to life with Fal.ai Kling technology.
AIStudio.whyStudioDesc: The Unverse AI engine is designed to take your creativity to the next level. Here, you don't just produce content, you build a digital empire.
AIStudio.animateLoadingLong: Video is being generated. This process may take 3-4 minutes, please do not leave the page...
AIStudio.outfitLockPlaceholder: Describe the outfit (e.g. Red Dress, Space Suit)...
AIStudio.outfitLockTooltip: Manually lock the clothing style to keep it consistent across different scenes.
AIStudio.savedInPoolDesc: Your image has been saved to the production pool (draft state).
AIStudio.featureFrozenDesc: This feature is currently under development and will be activated very soon.
AIStudio.digitalTwinDesc: Upload a photo to create your unique digital twin character.
AIStudio.aiEditDesc: Selective editing: Modify backgrounds or objects without changing the person.
AIStudio.selectAction: What's the next step for this masterpiece?
AIStudio.setupMainCharacterDesc: Define the physical traits for your virtual persona.
AIStudio.mainCharacterLockedDesc: Your digital twin is locked. You can now generate new scenes at a discounted price (5 ULC) without uploading a photo.
AIStudio.promptPlaceholder: Describe your content (e.g. red dress, sunset, balcony). Min 3 words or 20 characters.
AIStudio.promptPlaceholderDigitalTwin: Where do you want to see your digital twin? (e.g. drinking coffee in Paris, working out). Min 3 words.
AIStudio.promptPlaceholderAiEdit: Describe the changes you want (e.g. change background to beach, add a coffee in hand). Min 3 words.
AIStudio.needsMoreDetail: Needs more detail (min 3 words or 20 chars)
AIStudio.copilotMessage: Copilot will translate this into a rich {composition} scene
AIStudio.noCharacterToLock: You don't have a locked main character yet. Please create a profile below or produce a new photo and lock it.

Staking.title: ULC Staking
Staking.subtitle: Earn a portion of all platform fees by securing the network.
Staking.connectToEarn: Connect your wallet to earn platform yield.
Staking.welcomeBonusDesc: You've earned 15 ULC to start creating or unlocking content right away!
Staking.lockDesc: Lock ULC to receive staking rewards.
Staking.unstakeDesc: Withdraw your staked ULC back to available balance.
Staking.instantNotice: Unstaking is instant on Unverse. You will stop earning rewards for the withdrawn amount immediately.
Staking.rewardInfo: Staking rewards are derived from the 5% platform commission on every USDT monthly subscription. Incentives are calculated on the 27th of each month, based on the average staked balance over the preceding 30 days.

InvestorTokenomics.title: Investor Tokenomics
InvestorTokenomics.subtitle: A deep dive into the deflationary mechanics and yield structures of the $ULC ecosystem.
InvestorTokenomics.fixedSupplyDesc: Maximum supply is hard-capped. No further minting is possible under any circumstances.
InvestorTokenomics.deflationaryBurnDesc: Every AI content generation and premium unlock triggers a permanent supply reduction.
InvestorTokenomics.p1Desc: To ensure long-term stability, Pre-Sale tokens are subject to a 12-month cliff followed by a 24-month linear release. This ensures that early contributors are aligned with the multi-year growth of the platform.
InvestorTokenomics.p2Desc: Unlike inflationary tokens, $ULC yield is derived from actual platform revenue. 5% of all USDT monthly subscriptions are directed to the Staking Pool, which is distributed to ULC stakers every 30 days.
InvestorTokenomics.p3Desc: The platform utilizes USDT revenue to periodically buy back ULC from the open market to fund reward pools and strategic reserves, creating consistent upward pressure on token demand.
InvestorTokenomics.p4Desc: The Unverse AI economic parameters are sealed at the smart-contract and ledger levels. No entity can modify ratios or reset pools once the Economy Seal is active.
InvestorTokenomics.p5Desc: All core ecosystem allocations (Team, Advisors, Strategic Reserves) are subject to a 6-12 month cliff followed by a 24-36 month linear vesting, ensuring 100% long-term alignment.
InvestorTokenomics.quoteDesc: By combining a fixed supply with revenue-driven buybacks and staking rewards, $ULC is designed to scale directly with the growth of the Unverse AI platform users.
InvestorTokenomics.reserveProtocolDesc: The 420,000,000 ULC Reserve Pool is the cornerstone of Unverse's decade-long sustainability. To ensure total transparency and prevent inflationary shocks, the pool is governed by a strict release schedule.
InvestorTokenomics.daoNote: 40% of the released reserve (168M ULC) is dedicated to DAO Governance. Stakers will decide its allocation starting from Year 10.
InvestorTokenomics.aiBurnDesc: 30% of all fees from AI-generated content (Auto-Drafts) are permanently burned from the circulating supply.
InvestorTokenomics.buybackDesc: A portion of net platform profits is allocated to market buybacks and subsequent token burns, creating a perpetual demand-burn loop.

CreatorTokenomics.title: How Do I Earn?
CreatorTokenomics.subtitle: Discover how you can generate income by creating content and growing your community in the Unverse AI ecosystem.
CreatorTokenomics.subsDesc: 85% of your monthly USDT subscription revenue is instantly added to your balance.
CreatorTokenomics.unlockDesc: 85% of ULCs from users who unlock your exclusive content go to your account.
CreatorTokenomics.limitedDesc: Exclusive content with a supply limit. Create scarcity-driven value for your digital assets. Keep 85% of every sale.
CreatorTokenomics.aiStudioDesc: Create your own AI character or use AI Studio tools to generate stunning visuals in seconds. Every piece of content you prepare can bring you lifelong passive income.
CreatorTokenomics.s1Desc: Connect your wallet and prepare your creator profile in minutes.
CreatorTokenomics.s2Desc: Impress your community with AI Studio or your own designs.
CreatorTokenomics.s3Desc: Set your monthly subscription fee in USDT and start earning.
CreatorTokenomics.s4Desc: Withdraw USDT in your balance to your wallet at any time.
CreatorTokenomics.footerDesc: Unverse AI is the SocialFi platform that rewards creators' efforts in the fairest way. Rates are fixed, payments are instant.

Tokenomics.subtitle: Powered by $ULC Utility Token
Tokenomics.presaleDesc: Secure $ULC before DEX listing at 33% discount.
Tokenomics.baseNoticeDesc: $ULC will be natively launched on the **Base** network after the presale. Your connected EVM wallet (Wagmi) will be used for all claims and future utility, ensuring a seamless premium experience.
Tokenomics.investorDesc: Explore deflationary mechanics, revenue-backed yield, and long-term scarcity models.
Tokenomics.creatorDesc: Learn how to monetize your AI creativity with 85% revenue splits and instant payouts.
Tokenomics.sustainabilitySubtitle: Unlike generic social tokens, $ULC value is integrated into every platform interaction.
Tokenomics.deflationDesc: Every AI generation (3 ULC) burns 1 ULC permanently. Every premium unlock (15%) burns 5% total.
Tokenomics.yieldDesc: 5% of EVERY USDT subscription globally goes directly to the staking reward pool.
Tokenomics.fairSplitDesc: Creators keep 85% of their earnings. The platform never takes more than 15%.
Tokenomics.capDesc: The economy is sealed and immutable. Scarcity is hard-coded into the Unverse DNA.
Tokenomics.buybackNote: Drops below this price are dynamically prevented via the protocol's automated buyback mechanism.
Tokenomics.creatorProgramSubtitle: Join the elite first 100 creators and earn up to 1,000 ULC in performance rewards.
Tokenomics.welcomeRewardDesc: Get 200 ULC immediately upon joining (60 Promo / 140 Locked).
Tokenomics.milestoneRewardsDesc: +200 ULC for every 20 unique premium unlocks from active subscribers.
Tokenomics.totalPotentialDesc: Scale your earnings up to 1,000 ULC per creator.
Tokenomics.howToJoinDesc: Switch to Creator Mode and join the program from your dashboard. Only the first 100 verified creators are eligible.

Muse.uploadPhotosDesc: Upload 3 different photos (front and sides) for best results.
Muse.uploadInstruction: Upload a a clear face photo
Muse.readyToFix: Review and and fix your character.
Muse.fixSuccessDesc: Congratulations! You will now produce using this avatar.
Muse.onboardingSubtitle: First step: Create Your AI Character
Muse.onboardingDesc: To generate content, you must first fix an AI Avatar. This avatar will be your digital twin or your brand face, ensuring consistency across all generations.
Muse.createWithPhotoDesc: Upload your own photo and let AI create your digital twin.
Muse.aiCreateDesc: Describe your dream character and let AI create it from scratch.
Muse.characterFixed: Character Fixed - Ready for Consistent Production
Muse.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your character? This action cannot be undone.
Muse.mainRef: This character is the main reference for all generations.
Muse.actionDesc: Your character's physical traits (hair, eyes, face) will be automatically protected.
Muse.noProdYet: No production yet. Press the button above to start!
Muse.copilotIntegrationDesc: This avatar will now appear as your identity on the Copilot Assistant page, and protected traits will be maintained in automated drafts.

Community.heroDesc: Welcome to the heartbeat of Unverse AI. Join our global networks, explore our strategic vision, and shape the future of creator economy.
Community.investorDesc: Deep dive into the 1B fixed supply, M-Floor protocol, and AI-driven deflationary engine.
Community.creatorDesc: Learn how the first 100 creators earn dynamic bonuses and unlock high-yield monetization.
Community.forumDesc: Join the discussion. Wallet connection required for posting.
